title: FemboyMC
body:
# What Is FemboyMC?
the official modrinth modpack for FemboyMC minecraft server.

# What Are The Mods?
This modpack provides an easy setup lightweight starter pack for FemboyMC, including voicechat, shaders, and more.

# How Do I Join?
Click on multiplayer, and the server should be there! :3
